mechanism: Inhibits FLT3 and RAF/VEGFR signaling to block AML proliferation
additional_notes: FLT3-active; strong activity in FLT3-ITD AML including MOLM-13/MV4-11

mechanism: Inhibits FLT3 and related RTKs (VEGFR/PDGFR/KIT) reducing downstream signaling
additional_notes: FLT3-active; active in FLT3-ITD AML

mechanism: Potently inhibits FLT3 (WT and mutants) and ABL family kinases
additional_notes: Active in MOLM-13 and other FLT3-ITD lines

mechanism: Inhibits MET/VEGFR and FLT3 signaling pathways
additional_notes: Preclinical FLT3 activity in FLT3-ITD AML models

mechanism: Blocks RAF/VEGFR and reported FLT3 signaling to reduce AML cell viability
additional_notes: Submicromolar activity reported in FLT3-ITD AML assays

mechanism: Inhibits SRC family kinases, ABL, and KIT to suppress oncogenic signaling
additional_notes: Anti-AML activity; sensitivity varies by genotype

mechanism: Inhibits BCR-ABL and KIT signaling relevant to some AML subsets
additional_notes: Preclinical anti-AML effects; activity context-dependent

mechanism: Inhibits VEGFR/PDGFR and reported FLT3 signaling
additional_notes: Submicromolar activity in some FLT3-ITD AML studies

mechanism: Blocks MEK1/2 to inhibit RAS/MAPK signaling downstream of FLT3
additional_notes: Reported low- to mid-nanomolar activity in AML lines

mechanism: Inhibits MEK1 to reduce MAPK pathway signaling
additional_notes: Tens to hundreds of nM potency in AML lines

mechanism: Inhibits mTORC1 signaling, suppressing AML growth and survival pathways
additional_notes: Cell viability effects often submicromolar; Temsirolimus is an alternative agent in the same class

mechanism: Blocks JAK/STAT signaling implicated in AML survival
additional_notes: Activity is context-specific; can synergize with FLT3/BCL2 inhibitors

mechanism: Inhibits histone deacetylases to induce apoptosis/differentiation
additional_notes: Low-nanomolar viability effects in AML including FLT3-ITD

mechanism: Broad HDAC inhibition leading to apoptosis and differentiation in AML cells
additional_notes: Also known as SAHA; submicromolar to low micromolar activity reported

mechanism: Inhibits class I HDACs to trigger apoptosis in AML
additional_notes: Tens of nM potency in AML viability assays

mechanism: Blocks XPO1-mediated nuclear export causing tumor suppressor retention in nucleus
additional_notes: Robust preclinical AML activity including MOLM-13 and MV4-11

mechanism: Inhibits proteasomal degradation, inducing apoptosis in AML cells
additional_notes: Strong activity in FLT3-ITD AML (MOLM-13/MV4-11)

mechanism: Irreversibly inhibits the 20S proteasome catalytic activity
additional_notes: Low-nanomolar activity in AML lines

mechanism: Inhibits mitochondrial protein synthesis, impairing OXPHOS-dependent AML cells
additional_notes: Targets leukemic stem/progenitor mitochondrial translation; submicromolar activity

mechanism: Inhibits thioredoxin reductase, increasing oxidative stress and inducing apoptosis
additional_notes: Activity reported in FLT3-ITD models; submicromolar to low micromolar effects
